description: Self-similar CONTROL for the 3D trapped-air crush: the 1x tet mesh coordinates are scaled x k directly (same tets, same clamp DOF indices, no gmsh re-mesh), so the discretization is EXACTLY self-similar. This isolates the similitude prediction from gmsh's non-self-similar re-meshing. Peak-vM tet is in the contact-wall field (~0.23*blade from base), NOT at the clamp, at every scale.
note_vM: EXACTLY scale-invariant to 5 decimals across k=1.0/1.5/2.0.
note_disp: Scales EXACTLY x k (x1.5 and x2.0 to machine precision).
note_yield: yield depth = 22.3 / 0.12581 = 177.3 m at every scale (vM slope scale-invariant).
